stemHtml: A pilot received a prescription for anti-depressants containing psychoactive substances from a doctor but failed to consult with an Aviation Medical Examiner (AME). As a result, he/she…

options.a: CANNOT undertake his/her function, taking into consideration that human performance is impaired.
options.b: can undertake his/her function only if not acting as pilot flying.
options.c: can undertake his/her function only if the impact of the substances on the human performance is minor.
options.d: can undertake his/her function if he acts as pilot-in-command for that flight.
